source_meta.source_document: Arcos Modular Femoral Revision System Brochure and G7 Acetabular System

systems.system_notes: Revision total hip construct anchored to official Zimmer Biomet Arcos modular revision femoral and G7 acetabular materials.

trays.tray_notes: Official Arcos revision materials support modular revision instrumentation paired with compatible G7 acetabular workflow.

components.component_notes: Official Arcos revision materials describe distal stem options across multiple lengths and diameters.
Official Arcos modular revision materials describe proximal body options used to reconstruct revision anatomy.
Official G7 materials describe the acetabular shell family used in Zimmer Biomet hip constructs.
Official G7 materials describe compatible liner and bearing options used with the revision acetabular construct.
Official Zimmer Biomet revision construct materials describe modular femoral head options used with Arcos and G7.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current Arcos and G7 public source set confirms the revision construct and component families but this pass does not include a clean single revision implant code matrix row.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue, IFU, or supply-chain resource pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
